validation.eventNameRequired: Event name in English is required.
validation.invalidDateRange: Please choose valid start and end dates.
validation.endBeforeStart: End date must be the same day as the start date or later.
validation.recurrenceRequired: Please choose a recurrence type for recurring events.

calendarPage.title: Calendar
calendarPage.subtitle: Events displayed on a monthly calendar.
calendarPage.cardSubtitle: Click an event or campaign to open its details.

eventsPage.title: Events
eventsPage.subtitle: Create and manage events, then view them on your calendar.
eventsPage.createCardSubtitle: Fill in event details. It will appear on the Calendar page immediately.
eventsPage.cardSubtitle: Click any event to view details.
eventsPage.confirmedCardSubtitle: Only confirmed events are shown here. Detected events stay in the detected tab until confirmed or dismissed.
eventsPage.emptySubtitle: Create your first event to see it here and on the calendar.
eventsPage.emptyConfirmedSubtitle: Confirmed events will appear here after you create or confirm them.
eventsPage.draftsBannerSub: Confirm or dismiss to improve your sales forecasts.
eventsPage.draftsCardSub: AIMOPS found unusual sales activity in your data. Confirm each event to improve forecasting accuracy.
eventsPage.draftConfirmedNotice: "{{name}}" confirmed and added to your calendar.
eventsPage.draftsEmptySubtitle: Upload sales data to automatically detect unusual sales periods.
eventsPage.detectedCardSub: Review AI-detected events. Confirm useful ones or dismiss the ones you do not need.
eventsPage.detectedEmptySubtitle: When AIMOPS detects possible events from your sales data, they will appear here.
eventsPage.dismissSelectedPartialFailed: {{failed}} of {{total}} detected event(s) could not be dismissed.
eventsPage.deleteSelectedPartialFailed: {{failed}} of {{total}} event(s) could not be deleted.
eventsPage.dismissConfirmMessage: This will remove {{count}} selected detected event(s) from the review list. This action cannot be undone.
eventsPage.deleteConfirmMessageOne: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
eventsPage.deleteConfirmMessageMany: This will permanently delete {{count}} selected event(s). This action cannot be undone.

pageHelp.title: How to use Events

items.startDescription: Detected events are suggestions found by AIMOPS from your sales data. Review them before adding them to the official events list.
items.reviewDescription: Click Review to see the detected event period, affected products, and impact level. Confirm only the events that are useful for the business.
items.dismissDescription: If a detected event is not useful, select it and dismiss it. Dismissed detections are removed from the review list.
items.confirmedDescription: Confirmed events are the official business events. They can be used for calendar planning and impact analysis.
items.manualDescription: Use Create Event when you already know an important occasion, campaign-related date, season, or business event.
items.deleteDescription: Delete confirmed events only when they are wrong or no longer needed, because removing them can affect event tracking and future analysis.

pageHelp.note: Tip: Detected events are suggestions. Confirmed events are the ones AIMOPS treats as real business events.

eventDetailsPage.title: Event Details
eventDetailsPage.subtitle: View event information, edit it, and run impact analysis.
eventDetailsPage.editCardSubtitle: Update any event field and save.
eventDetailsPage.impactCardSubtitle: Run analysis to calculate impact and see affected products.
eventDetailsPage.analysisBlockFallback: Cannot analyze yet. Missing required sales data for this event period.
eventDetailsPage.noAnalysisYet: No detailed analysis yet. Click "Analyze Impact" to calculate and show affected products.
eventDetailsPage.notFoundSubtitle: The event may have been deleted or is unavailable.

draftModal.title: Detected Event: {{start}} – {{end}}
draftModal.topbarLabel: Detected sales activity — review and confirm to improve forecasts
draftModal.formSub: Give it a name so it can be used in future forecasts.
draftModal.errorNameRequired: Please enter a name for this event.
draftModal.errorConfirmFailed: Could not confirm event. Please try again.
draftModal.errorDismissFailed: Could not dismiss event. Please try again.
draftModal.confirmedSuccess: Event confirmed and added to your calendar.
draftModal.dismissedInfo: Event dismissed. It won't affect your forecasts.
